productName: Const HRG EFCT 1:2:2 Pineapple Passion Fruit Guava + Green Tea extract (200 CBC, 200 CBG) 10 Pack (S)
strain: 1:2:2 Pineapple Passion Fruit Guava + Green Tea
description: Soft crisp, sweet apple gummies with a farmers-market fruit character, a glossy confectioner’s finish, and a cannabis infusion folded in as smoothly as a secret family recipe. It blends THC for a classic euphoric lift, CBD to keep things calm and balanced, and CBG to support daytime focus and clarity in a 1:2:2 ratio. For smooth, calm energy.
